subcodes.first_line: O my God! I supplicate unto the Kingdom of Thy sanctification and the Realm of Thy divine unity, confessing my grievous sins [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی ابتهل الی ملکوت تقدیسک و جبروت توحیدک مقرا بجریراتی العظمی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @power of prayer, @prayer for protection, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @living waters; water of life
